data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Guest incident reports (noise complaints, damage) with host signature', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is met. The linked use case outlines the need for host signatures on guest incident reports, yet the prior steps do not include any evidence of such signatures being captured or validated. This indicates a clear gap in the validation process for the specified requirement.
gaps: No evidence of guest incident reports being captured with host signatures.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add endpoint to capture guest incident reports
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that guest incident reports include host signatures.
